name: nature-skills
description: Academic writing, figure, citation, data availability, response, reader, and paper-to-presentation skills for Nature-style scientific work.

interface.shortDescription: Nature-style academic writing, figures, citations, and paper workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Nature Skills to polish manuscript prose, prepare publication-grade figures, add strict academic citations, draft Data Availability and FAIR metadata statements, write peer-review responses, generate bilingual paper readers, and convert papers into Chinese journal-club PPTX decks.
defaultPrompt: Polish this abstract in Nature style.
Make this paper into a Chinese journal-club PPT.
Add strict Nature-family citations to this paragraph.
